message:
fix(tui): block History mode shortcuts when file tree has focus

When the file tree pane has focus in History mode, keys v/h/c/y/o
were incorrectly handled by the view-toggle/copy/open handlers
instead of being passed to file tree navigation. Now these shortcuts
are gated on !history_file_tree_focus so they only fire from the
commit list or detail panes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
